lyrics.text: Maybe I'm selfish, call me see through
lyrics.translation: 也许我确实自私 还是说我都已看穿了

lyrics.text: But I'm debating if I really need to
lyrics.translation: 但我也会为心中坚持而斗争对抗

lyrics.text: Tie down to someone forever
lyrics.translation: 当我真的渴望为爱停驻 不再流浪

lyrics.text: Sure I get lonely sometimes, I miss being together
lyrics.translation: 我也会有孤单的时候 有想念有人陪伴的时候

lyrics.text: But, hey!, when I roam from city to city
lyrics.translation: 但当我在不同城市间穿梭奔流

lyrics.text: Let the highway and the crowds, and the hunger that's in me
lyrics.translation: 急行的车道 拥挤的人群 总能让我心中的渴望和斗志汹涌

lyrics.text: Fill me up with fireworks and tell me I'm skinny
lyrics.translation: 用漫天烟火填满我迸发的心 心有千钧我也依然瘦小轻盈

lyrics.text: Soak up the fire and the buzz they give me
lyrics.translation: 将他人的闲言碎语 伤人火力通通吸纳滋养自己

lyrics.text: Oo oo oo oo oo
Long nights, stay up late
lyrics.translation: 长夜漫漫 我在枕边辗转

lyrics.text: Drink the sky, meditate
lyrics.translation: 细品星空 我常陷入冥想

lyrics.text: Oo oo oo oo oo
Open eyes, sunroof
lyrics.translation: 睁开双眼 打开车顶天窗

lyrics.text: Give me miles  , give me truth
lyrics.translation: 日出之时再行万里 用我双眼靠近真相

lyrics.text: Sometimes I get high, sometimes I get low
lyrics.translation: 有时我斗志昂扬敢与天比高 有时也情绪失落陷入泥沼

lyrics.text: But I'm calm as can be in a room full of strangers
lyrics.translation: 但我会像周围都是陌生人般不显露一分一毫

lyrics.text: But oh my, don't try to get close
lyrics.translation: 若你心有属意也请别试着靠近

lyrics.text: I'm just gonna leave, 'cause baby I'm a lone ranger
lyrics.translation: 因为亲爱的 我只是个飘摇不定的独行者 随时都会远离

lyrics.text: Na na na na na, na na na na na na, na na na na na na
I'm a lone ranger
lyrics.translation: 孤独前行 心无定所

lyrics.text: I'm a lion, I'm a tiger
lyrics.translation: 我似雄狮也似猛虎

lyrics.text: I'm a caged bird, I'm on fire
lyrics.translation: 是那被囚之鸟 是那不灭渴望似火燃烧

lyrics.text: Got these paper wings, but they don't hold the air
lyrics.translation: 若双翼太过脆弱 就难以护住心爱的巢

lyrics.text: Get so close to somebody but I don't stay there
lyrics.translation: 会向某人无比靠近 但却不会就此安定交出我心

lyrics.text: Much less brave than I admit
lyrics.translation: 或许我比我认同之中懦弱许多

lyrics.text: Much more scared than they all think
lyrics.translation: 平静之下隐藏的也比他人想象中可怕得多

lyrics.text: But I'm protecting this organ in my chest
lyrics.translation: 但只要保护好胸腔内的心脏依旧跳动

lyrics.text: 'Cause the blood sweat and tears they can make quite a mess
lyrics.translation: 因为汗水血泪有时会形成牵绊 搞砸一切

lyrics.text: Oo oo oo oo oo
Open eyes, open roof
lyrics.translation: 睁开双眼 打开天窗

lyrics.text: Give me miles, give me truth
lyrics.translation: 日出之时再行万里 用我双眼靠近真相

lyrics.text: Sometimes I get high, sometimes I get low
lyrics.translation: 有时我斗志昂扬敢与天比高 有时也情绪失落陷入泥沼

lyrics.text: But I'm calm as can be in a room full of strangers
lyrics.translation: 但我会像周围都是陌生人般不显露一分一毫

lyrics.text: But oh my, don't try to get close
lyrics.translation: 若你心有属意也请别试着靠近

lyrics.text: I'm just gonna leave, 'cause baby I'm a lone ranger
lyrics.translation: 因为亲爱的 我只是个飘摇不定的独行者 随时都会远离

lyrics.text: Na na na na na, na na na na na na, na na na na na na
'Cause baby I'm a lone ranger
lyrics.translation: 我如独行者般飘摇不定

lyrics.text: I don't wanna get broken baby
lyrics.translation: 即使孤独 我也不要心碎

lyrics.text: I don't wanna get broken baby
lyrics.translation: 心无定所好过心碎残破

lyrics.text: I don't wanna get broken baby
lyrics.translation: 孤独前行也才不会心碎难过

lyrics.text: Cut open baby, cut open baby
lyrics.translation: 剖开我的心 你就能看得清楚

lyrics.text: I don't wanna get broken baby
lyrics.translation: 即使孤独 我也不要心碎
